# Aurora UI

> Copy-paste animated React components for Next.js — **shadcn-compatible** registry + CLI + MCP.

## Live site

**https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/components**

## npm packages

- CLI: `npx aurora-ui-cli`
- MCP: `npx aurora-ui-mcp`

## shadcn-style workflow

```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli init
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/theme @aurora/utils
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/shimmer-button
```

Or Aurora CLI only:

```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli docs shimmer-button --json
npx aurora-ui-cli add shimmer-button
```

## AI resources

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| Agent guide | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/docs/FOR_AI.md |
| Agent manifest | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/.well-known/agents.json |
| Registry item | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/r/{slug}.json |
| shadcn index | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/shadcn-registry.json |
| Component API | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/api/components/{slug} |

## MCP (shadcn-compatible tools)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "aurora-ui": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "aurora-ui-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

Tools: `list_items_in_registries`, `search_items_in_registries`, `get_add_command_for_items`, `get_item_examples_from_registries`, `get_component_guide`

## Skill

See [skills/aurora-ui/SKILL.md](skills/aurora-ui/SKILL.md)

## Repository

https://github.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui
